major_changes_since_jan27: BBS grammar fixes (Fix B: brace function semantics)
Myrddin BBS v4.0.6 full integration test

issues.title: Parser Improvements: Q-Registers and lsargs
issues.body:
## Parser Improvements

### Items
1. **SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:1845** — Handle Q-registers containing evaluation strings properly
2. **SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:1663** — Implement lsargs (list-style arguments) support
3. **SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:1682** — Implement parsed message alternative for better performance

### Why
These are parser enhancements for better PennMUSH compatibility.

### Current Status
Core parser working. SLL mode enabled (171x faster). BBS compatibility proven.

### Tasks
- [ ] Handle Q-registers with evaluation strings
- [ ] Add lsargs support
- [ ] Implement parsed message alternative

issues.title: Parser Refactoring: Function Resolution and Argument Handling
issues.body:
## Parser Refactoring

### Items
1. **SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:418** — Move function resolution to Library Service
2. **SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:538** — Depth checking before argument refinement
3. **SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:600** — Pass ParserContexts directly as arguments
4. **SharpMUSHParserVisitor.cs:1595** — Single-token command argument splitting

### Why
Code organization and performance improvements.

### Tasks
- [ ] Refactor function resolution to dedicated service
- [ ] Review depth checking timing
- [ ] Pass ParserContexts directly

issues.title: Command Enhancements: Stack Rewinding, Flags, Validation
issues.body:
## Command Enhancements

### Items
1. **GeneralCommands.cs:6164** — Implement parser stack rewinding
2. **GeneralCommands.cs:6359** — Retroactive flag updates to existing attributes
3. **GeneralCommands.cs:6452** — Attribute validation via regex patterns
4. **MoreCommands.cs:1874** — Money/penny transfer system
5. **WizardCommands.cs:683/704/2370** — SPEAK() function integration

### Why
Enhanced PennMUSH command compatibility.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implement parser stack rewinding
- [ ] Retroactive flag updates
- [ ] Attribute regex validation
- [ ] Money transfer
- [ ] SPEAK() integration

issues.title: Function Enhancements: ANSI, WebSocket, Character Iteration
issues.body:

3. **HTMLFunctions.cs:246** — WebSocket/out-of-band HTML communication
4. **JSONFunctions.cs:480** — WebSocket/out-of-band JSON communication
5. **StringFunctions.cs:1017** — Apply attribute function to each character
6. **StringFunctions.cs:1042** — ANSI reconstruction after text replacements

### Why
Enhanced function compatibility with PennMUSH.

### Tasks
- [ ] pcreate() timestamp format
- [ ] ANSI module refactoring
- [ ] WebSocket communication

issues.title: Test Infrastructure: Skipped and Failing Tests
issues.body:
## Test Infrastructure

### Context
There are **243 tests currently skipped** and several TODO comments in test files that indicate test improvements needed.

### Skipped Test Categories
- RecursionAndInvocationLimitTests: 3 tests (need NotifyService checks)
- ListFunctionUnitTests: 4 tests (implementation issues)
- HelpfileTests: 2 tests (moving to new help system)
- Various others: 234 tests across all categories

### TODO Items in Tests
1. **RecursionAndInvocationLimitTests.cs** — NotifyService recursion error checks
2. **RegistersUnitTests.cs** — Full server integration tests
3. **ListFunctionUnitTests.cs** — %iL value, #@ token, ibreak() evaluation
4. **StringFunctionUnitTests.cs** — decomposeweb and decompose bugs
5. **DatabaseCommandTests.cs** — Loop bug investigation
6. **CommandUnitTests.cs** — Eval vs noparse evaluation

### Priority
- Investigate and fix top 20 skipped tests
- Document reason for remaining skipped tests

### Tasks
- [ ] Fix decompose() bug (StringFunctionUnitTests.cs:272)
- [ ] Fix eval vs noparse (CommandUnitTests.cs:32)
- [ ] Investigate loop bug (DatabaseCommandTests.cs:259)
- [ ] Enable server integration tests in RegistersUnitTests
- [ ] Fix ListFunctionUnitTests skipped tests

issues.title: Complete 7 Remaining Administrative Commands
issues.body:
## Remaining 7 Administrative Commands

All remaining commands are optional administrative enhancements.

### Commands
1. **@ALLHALT** — Emergency halt all queued commands
2. **@CHOWNALL** — Change ownership of all objects
3. **@POLL** — Polling/survey system
4. **@PURGE** — Purge inactive objects
5. **@READCACHE** — Display cache statistics
6. **@SHUTDOWN** — Server shutdown
7. **@SUGGEST** — Suggestion system

### Implementation Notes
- All in WizardCommands.cs
- None are production blockers
- Implement based on operational need

### Tasks
- [ ] @ALLHALT (halt queued commands)
- [ ] @CHOWNALL (bulk ownership change)
- [ ] @POLL (polling system)
- [ ] @PURGE (object purge)
- [ ] @READCACHE (cache stats)
- [ ] @SHUTDOWN (server shutdown)
- [ ] @SUGGEST (suggestion system)
